Context: B2B voice execution product landing page for Voxera.
Description of the screen: A premium, continuous long-landing page for Voxera with a deep dark theme and a subtle grid background. The entire layout is perfectly center-aligned on a 1600px desktop canvas. 

Hero Section: Centered two-line Korean headline '¸»ÇĎ±â. µč±â. ľ˛±â. ŔĚ ¸đµç °ÍŔ» ÇĎłŞ·Î.' and 'şńÁî´Ď˝ş Ŕ˝Ľş Çő¸í, Áö±Ý ˝ĂŔŰÇĎĽĽżä.' below it. Two unified premium CTA buttons ('ą«·á·Î ˝ĂŔŰÇĎ±â', 'µĄ¸đ ˝ĹĂ»ÇĎ±â') are centered underneath. A large, realistic glass microphone sits centrally below with a strong glow, maintaining a 120px gap from the CTA block. Compact, aurora-colored neon waveform clusters are placed symmetrically on both sides of the microphone.

Trust Bar: A centered row of logos including KAKAO, NOTION, GOOGLE, and NAVER MEMO in a subtle, monochromatic treatment.

screens.title: Voxera B2B Voice Landing Page

outputComponents.text:
The design for the Voxera B2B voice execution landing page has been created:

- **Voxera B2B Voice Landing Page**: A high-end, continuous desktop landing page featuring a deep dark premium theme with a central axis. It includes a centered Korean headline, a large glowing glass microphone flanked by neon waveform clusters, a monochromatic trust bar with major brands, and a Vercel-inspired bento grid showcasing key performance metrics.

Would you like to adjust the layout of the bento grid or perhaps add more detailed feature sections further down the page?

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a detailed "How it Works" section below the bento grid.
